hero.title: Gũkinyanĩra
hero.lead: IATF ĩkoragwo na muoroto wa gũtũma website ĩno ĩkorũo ĩrĩ hũthũ gũthoma, ĩhotage kũhũthĩrũo na keyboard, na ĩkonana na tekinoronjĩ cia gũteithĩrĩria.
support: IATF ĩhũthagĩra ũhoro wĩgiĩ kũhingũrwo kwa intaneti [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Ũndũ ũcio nĩ wonanagio nĩ ũrĩa andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra tekinolonjĩ cia gũteithĩrĩria mamenyerete ũhoro ũcio.

header.title: Kũruta riboti ĩgiĩ ũndũ ũtarĩ mũhũthũ gũkinyĩra andũ

paragraphs: Ũngĩkora ũndũ ũragiria wĩtĩkĩrio kũhingũra website ĩno, no ũtũmenyithie kũgerera e-mail:
Riboti cia bata nĩ ta ici:
items: nĩ tekinoronjĩ ĩrĩkũ ya gũteithĩrĩria, browser, kana mũbango ũrarũmĩrĩra, angĩkorũo nĩ ũrabatarania
report.footnote: Ndwagĩrĩirũo kwandĩka riboti ya kĩhumo ya mahĩtia macio.

paragraphs: Ciũria ciĩgiĩ ũhotekeku wa gũtaũkĩrũo nĩ ũhoro ũcio no ciigwo icunjĩ-inĩ cia ũhoro ũcio nĩguo ũhote kũrũnga ũndũ ũcio ũtarĩ wa ndũire.
Angĩkorũo riboti yaku nĩ ĩhutĩtie ũhoro wa mũndũ kĩũmbe-rĩ, ĩtaarĩrie wega ndũmĩrĩri-inĩ ĩyo.
Gĩikaro gĩkĩ nĩ kĩnini na nĩ kĩrũmu mũno. Thiomi imwe no ikorũo itarĩ nginyanĩru rĩrĩa ũtaũri ũraharũrũkio.
